tagline: Family-run auto shop on W Burbank Blvd.

hero.heading: The honest auto shop on Burbank Blvd.
hero.subheading: Family-owned shop on West Burbank Boulevard. Diagnostic, brakes, suspension, oil & service — open six days a week, written quote on every job.

about.label: The shop
about.heading: Family shop. No upsells. Open Saturday morning.
paragraphs: T&G has been on West Burbank Boulevard since 1998. Husband-and-wife operation with two lifts, a senior technician on every job, and a service writer who answers the phone himself.
We do the day-one repairs and the routine maintenance — brakes, oil, fluids, tires, alignment, suspension, AC service. Anything more specialized than that we refer to a friend's shop we trust.
Closed Sundays. Saturday we open at seven and close at three. The kitchen across the parking lot makes a great breakfast burrito while you wait.

services.title: Diagnostic
services.description: OBD scan, live data, road test if needed. Printed report. Free with any repair we perform.

services.title: Brakes
services.description: Pads, rotors, calipers, fluid. Spec-matched friction. Bedded-in on the road before delivery.

services.title: Oil + 20-point Inspection
services.description: Synthetic-blend or full-synthetic, OEM filter, top-offs, documented 20-point check.

services.title: Tires + Alignment
services.description: Four tires mounted and balanced plus four-wheel alignment. We carry Michelin, Continental, Falken.

services.title: Suspension
services.description: Struts, shocks, control arms, bushings. Four-wheel alignment after every install.

services.title: AC Service
services.description: Diagnostic, leak check, evac-and-recharge. EPA-certified. Get it done before summer.

reviews.name: Karen W.
reviews.text: T&G is the only shop in Burbank I trust with both family cars. They have never recommended a service we didn't need and they have never missed one we did. The bill is always exactly what was quoted.

reviews.name: Ross D.
reviews.text: Came in for what I thought was an expensive transmission job. T&G diagnosed it as a fifty-dollar mount, did the work the same afternoon, and saved me a thousand-dollar repair. Real shop.

reviews.name: Lupita G.
reviews.text: Walked in for a brake job and walked out feeling like I'd met two friends. The shop is family-run and it feels like a family. Cars are safer there than at any chain in town.

contact.mapEmbedQuery: T&G Auto Repair, 1525 W Burbank Blvd, Burbank, CA 91506

seo.title: T&G Auto Repair — Honest family auto shop in Burbank
seo.description: A husband-and-wife auto shop on West Burbank Boulevard since 1998. Diagnostic, brakes, oil, tires, suspension. Written quotes free. Open six days.
